docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED LOAN SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, ROLAND L. DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED LOAN SERVICES, INC. SERVED APR-30-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, ROLAND L.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED LOAN SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, ROLAND L.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED LOAN SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYES, ROLAND L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 724 CENTRAL AVENUE S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, ROLAND L.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVERSIFIED LOAN SERVICES, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, ROLAND L.
